name: Starter Pack
description: Get up and running fast — includes a Personal Assistant with full tool access and a Web Research Agent, plus a ready-to-use Content Research & Writing Pipeline.

name: Developer Pack
description: Built for engineering teams — includes a Code Review Agent, Software Engineer Agent, QA Engineer, Deployment Monitor, and a complete Dev base and Strict Pipeline orchestration.

name: Productivity Pack
description: Business and content power-users — includes a Data Analyst, Content Writer, Jira Analyst, Slack Notifier, and Market Intelligence orchestration.

name: MCP Servers Pack
description: Pre-configured MCP server definitions for GitHub, Slack, Notion, Brave Search, and more. Connect your agents to external services instantly.
